task_completion.description: Draw an elliptical ROI on the central bright circular structure
task_completion.visual_evidence: An elliptical ROI overlay is visible, specifically targeting the bright circular structure in the center of the loaded CT image in the DICOM viewer.

task_completion.description: View the ROI statistics in the DICOM viewer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DICOM viewer displays the measurement statistics (Mean, StdDev, Min, Max, Pixels/Area) for the drawn elliptical ROI on the screen.

task_completion.description: Record the statistics in the specified text format
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the statistics recorded exactly in the requested format: 'ROI Type: Ellipse', followed by 'Mean:', 'StdDev:', 'Min:', 'Max:', and 'Pixels:' with their corresponding values.

task_completion.description: Save the text report to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar, a file manager, or a terminal command confirms the text file is saved to '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/roi_statistics.txt'.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the annotated view
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or image viewer confirms an image file named 'roi_annotated.jpg' is saved in '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/', and it contains a screenshot of the DICOM viewer with the image and ROI overlay.

integrity.description: Agent used the DICOM viewer GUI to generate the statistics
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent actively using the DICOM viewer's ROI tools to draw the ellipse and generate the statistics, rather than just opening a text editor and fabricating numbers.

integrity.description: Recorded statistics match the GUI output
integrity.visual_evidence: The values recorded in the text report for Mean, StdDev, Min, Max, and Pixels must exactly match the values displayed by the DICOM viewer's ROI measurement overlay.

integrity.description: The recorded Mean value is physically plausible for the target structure
integrity.visual_evidence: The recorded Mean value in the text report must be between 500 and 3000 (ideally exactly 976, which is the true mean of the central structure).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected statistics export path is '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/roi_statistics.txt'. The expected annotated screenshot filename must contain 'roi_annotated'. The target central circular region has a true mean pixel value of exactly 976. A plausible mean value for the ROI must be between 500 and 3000.
